title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role will build and scale the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine as the company enters its 2026 growth phase. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling revenue ops beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience collaborating with globally distributed teams across time zones, including the Tel Aviv HQ, is essential.
score_reason: Omri exceeds all core requirements: 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps (vs 7+ required), deep Salesforce expertise, proven scaling experience, and perfect location fit with Tel Aviv HQ alignment. The only minor consideration is whether his experience extends to the specific $30M+ ARR scaling phase, but his seniority level suggests this is well within his wheelhouse.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and thought of you immediately—this feels like it was written for your background. You're building the exact operational infrastructure Finout needs for its 2026 growth phase, and your 15+ years scaling RevOps in high-growth B2B SaaS, combined with your proximity to their Tel Aviv HQ, positions you uniquely to lead their cross-functional GTM engine. Would you be open to a quick conversation about how this aligns with your next move?

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: A key partner role for Sales and RevOps focused on territory strategy. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models and processes for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, conducting quantitative and qualitative analyses, supporting GTM planning cycles with assignments and whitespace analysis, and maintaining territory mapping in Fullcast and Salesforce. The salary range is $149,000–$175,000 USD, plus a work-from-home stipend and incentive compensation.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience aligns perfectly with territory strategy, Salesforce/Fullcast optimization, and GTM planning responsibilities at a high-growth SaaS leader. Remote US role meets location flexibility requirements.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across the RevOps Manager role at Gong focused on territory strategy and scalability—your background architecting revenue operations at scale in B2B SaaS feels like a natural fit for redesigning global territory models and optimizing GTM planning cycles. Given Gong's position in the revenue intelligence space and the quantitative rigor this role demands, I thought you'd find it compelling. Would you be open to a brief conversation about how your experience driving pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV optimization could accelerate their territory operations?

title: RevOps Expert
description: Join Remote's Revenue Operations team to optimize sales processes and system architecture. You'll drive strategic initiatives aligned with the go-to-market strategy, champion scalable process design, and implement solutions using methodologies like Six Sigma and Agile. Requires strong operations management background, experience with tools such as LeanData, Zapier, and Camunda, deep Salesforce (SFDC) proficiency, and a data-driven mindset. SaaS/B2B experience and remote work experience preferred. All positions are fully remote.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and B2B SaaS background. Strong match on strategic process optimization and systems architecture, though Six Sigma/Camunda experience not explicitly mentioned in profile.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building scalable revenue operations and GTM strategies in B2B SaaS, with deep Salesforce expertise and a track record of transforming sales processes through data-driven optimization. Remote's focus on strategic process design and system architecture aligns perfectly with my experience architecting go-to-market infrastructure, and I'm excited about the opportunity to drive the kind of operational excellence that fuels predictable revenue growth at scale.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: An ideal role for someone who thrives in ambiguity and has stood up RevOps infrastructure before. You'll build and own the Salesforce environment for New Verticals—objects, fields, flows, and automations—design revenue tech stack integrations, and establish system architecture standards. Requires 5+ years in Revenue/Sales/GTM Operations with 2+ years in a senior capacity and deep Salesforce expertise. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot is valued; AI-assisted tooling experience is a plus.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with deep Salesforce expertise aligns perfectly with the Systems-focused role. Remote US position accommodates global flexibility, and AI-native GTM background plus familiarity with Outreach/LeanData/HubSpot stack directly addresses job requirements.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up in B2B SaaS, and I'm impressed by Flex's approach to establishing system architecture standards across New Verticals. Having designed and owned complex Salesforce environments—including custom objects, flows, and integrations with tools like Outreach and LeanData—I'm particularly drawn to the opportunity to architect a scalable revenue tech stack that can grow with your business.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As the company scales rapidly, they need a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations to make the GTM team highly effective. The role involves replacing manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—including lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly.
score_reason: Strong alignment on GTM automation, AI workflows, and RevOps tooling; however, the role's heavy emphasis on coding and technical implementation is a potential weak point for a RevOps executive vs. RevOps engineer. Excellent fit if Omri has hands-on technical skills; moderate fit if primarily strategic.
ai_opener: Omri here—your GTM Engineer role caught my attention because scaling AI-native GTM operations is exactly where RevOps needs to evolve. I've built lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, and automation frameworks at scale in B2B SaaS, and I'm curious how you're thinking about replacing manual workflows with purpose-built tools as Conveo scales with enterprise brands like Unilever and Google.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Redwood Software seeks a GTM Engineer to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of AI-driven tools, automations, and processes across the marketing department, ensuring the org leverages AI safely and creatively. Requires 5+ years in marketing operations, marketing technology, or demand gen with B2B GTM understanding, deep knowledge of MarTech platforms (Salesforce, Marketo, Outreach), and a strong grasp of generative AI tools and workflow automation platforms like Make.com, Zapier, and Workato.
